description: Curated knowledge corpus for agents: how USD works, how assets are created here, how validation promotes work, how physics binds and how PBR and MDL materials are authored.

items.name: USD fundamentals
items.description: Stages, layers, prims, composition arcs, schemas, geometry conventions and the grounding rule.

items.name: Asset creation in this factory
items.description: The asset layer stack, authoring rules, packaging and exemplar-first authoring.

items.name: How validation works here
items.description: Gate families, promotion states and what agents must never do.

items.name: PhysX and physical property binding
items.description: UsdPhysics schema names, joints and articulations and how proposals become authored opinions.

items.name: PBR, MDL and material authoring
items.description: The metallic-roughness model, MDL in Omniverse, map policy and library-grounded texture work.
